videos.title: How to Write the Perfect Page Title for SEO
videos.description: Learn how to write SEO-optimized page titles that improve search rankings and click-through rates.

videos.title: Title Tags — SEO Best Practices
videos.description: Brad covers title tag best practices including length, keywords, and formatting for SEO.

videos.title: HTML Page Title Tutorial
videos.description: Kyle explains the HTML title element and how to use it correctly for both users and search engines.

videos.title: Dynamic Page Titles with JavaScript
videos.description: Learn how to dynamically update page titles with JavaScript for SPAs and notification badges.

videos.title: SEO Meta Tags Crash Course
videos.description: Comprehensive guide to meta tags including title, description, and Open Graph tags.

videos.title: How Google Uses Page Titles
videos.description: Google's official explanation of how page titles work in search results and how to optimize them.
